De Telegraaf cover comments from the defender today in a pre-match press conference, during which he was asked about his future. arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has hailed Reds captain Virgil van Dijk, although the 33-year-old's future remains up in the air with just six months left on his contract

arts.ttl: Palmeiras boss aims savage swipe at Jurgen Klopp after ex-Liverpool manager touched down in Brazil for visit to Red Bull Bragantino after taking on new job following Anfield exit
